name: panicdna-claude-busy-indicator
description: A Claude Code skills marketplace for desktop busy indicators. Pick one: an mpv video window (WSL2/WSLg) or a pixel-art animal overlay (Electron). Each plugin bundles install/uninstall skills.

plugins.name: busy-indicator
plugins.description: Desktop video busy indicator for Claude Code on WSL2/WSLg. Plays a looped mpv video window while Claude works. Bundles the 'install-busy-indicator' and 'uninstall-busy-indicator' skills.

plugins.name: animal-busy-indicator
plugins.description: Transparent pixel-art animal overlay busy indicator. Runs a pixel-art animal (cat/dog/fox/rabbit) along a screen edge via a frameless Electron window while Claude works. Bundles the 'install-animal-busy-indicator' and 'uninstall-animal-busy-indicator' skills.
